loop1.title: Energy Input & Distribution
loop1.note: Supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are dark (has_data=N) and will render as honest-blanks; only load-side feeders (UPS, BPDB) have live data.

loop1.title: Energy Flow Diagram
loop1.note: Showing energy flow for active feeders (UPS-01, UPS-02, UPS-03, BPDB-01, BPDB-02, UPS-04); incomers and UPS-05/06 are dark (no data) and will render as honest blanks.
